revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月12日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == *[[寛永]]9年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1632年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川家光]]、[[徳川忠長]]を[[改易]]
== 誕生日 == * [[万暦]]28年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[11月17日]]） - [[朱舜水]]、[[明]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1682年]]） * [[文政]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月26日]]） - [[佐々木高行]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1910年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[万治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1658年]][[11月7日]]） - [[前田利常]]、[[加賀藩]]主（* [[1594年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[11月28日]]） - [[松尾芭蕉]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月9日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1698年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|11|10|13|9|12|11|10|1012}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 12'''<!--Lunar October12--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == *[[寛永]]9年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1632年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川家光]]、[[徳川忠長]]を[[改易]]
== Births == * [[万暦]]28年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[11月17日]]） - [[朱舜水]]、[[明]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1682年]]） * [[文政]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1830年]][[11月26日]]） - [[佐々木高行]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1910年]]）
== Deaths == * [[万治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1658年]][[11月7日]]） - [[前田利常]]、[[加賀藩]]主（* [[1594年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[11月28日]]） - [[松尾芭蕉]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月9日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1698年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|11|10|13|9|12|11|10|1012}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

== Deaths == * [[万治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1658年]][[11月7日]]） - [[前田利常]]、[[加賀藩]]主（* [[1594年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[11月28日]]） - [[松尾芭蕉]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月9日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1698年]]）

[[sn:October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 12일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十二]] [[zh:十月十二]] [[en:draft:October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1632|ja|1632}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|ja|徳川忠長}} were deposed.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}28年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Shunshūsui|ja|朱舜水}}, a Confucian scholar of the Ming (* {{ill|1682|ja|1682}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|ja|佐々木高行}}, a statesman († {{ill|1910|ja|1910}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1658|ja|1658}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}}） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|ja|前田利常}}, the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|ja|1594}}). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1694|ja|1694}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}}） – {{ill|Bashō|ja|松尾芭蕉}}, the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Meiwa|ja|明和}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1769|ja|1769}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|ja|青木昆陽}}, a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|ja|1698}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|11|10|13|9|12|11|10|1012}}

[[sn:October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 12일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十二]] [[zh:十月十二]] [[en:draft:October 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1632|ja|1632}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|ja|徳川忠長}} were deposed.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 28th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Shunshūsui|ja|朱舜水}} , a Confucian scholar of the Ming (* {{ill|1682|ja|1682}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|ja|佐々木高行}} , a statesman († {{ill|1910|ja|1910}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1658|ja|1658}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|ja|前田利常}} , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|ja|1594}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1694|ja|1694}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Bashō|ja|松尾芭蕉}} , the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|ja|Meiwa}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1769|ja|1769}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|ja|青木昆陽}} , a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|ja|1698}} ). == See Also! ==

== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1632|ja|1632}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|ja|徳川忠長}} were deposed.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 28th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Shunshūsui|ja|朱舜水}} , a Confucian scholar of the Ming (* {{ill|1682|ja|1682}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|ja|佐々木高行}} , a statesman († {{ill|1910|ja|1910}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1658|ja|1658}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|ja|前田利常}} , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|ja|1594}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1694|ja|1694}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Bashō|ja|松尾芭蕉}} , the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|ja|Meiwa}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1769|ja|1769}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|ja|青木昆陽}} , a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|ja|1698}} ).

{{Lunisolar October}} '''October 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1632|ja|1632}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|ja|徳川忠長}} were deposed.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 28th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Shunshūsui|ja|朱舜水}} , a Confucian scholar of the Ming (* {{ill|1682|ja|1682}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1830|ja|1830}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|ja|佐々木高行}} , a statesman († {{ill|1910|ja|1910}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1658|ja|1658}} {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} ） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|ja|前田利常}} , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|ja|1594}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1694|ja|1694}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Bashō|ja|松尾芭蕉}} , the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|ja|Meiwa}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1769|ja|1769}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|ja|青木昆陽}} , a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|ja|1698}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十二]][[zh:十月十二]] {{Not to be confused with|October 12|qq=October 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十二]][[zh:十月十二]] {{Not to be confused with|October 12|qq=October 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|11|10|13|9|12|11|10|1012|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1632|1632]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] and [[:en:Tokugawa Tadanaga|Tokugawa Tadanaga]] were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Zhu Zhiyu|Zhu Zhiyu]] , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* [[:en:1682|1682]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1830|1830]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – [[:en:Sasaki Takayuki|Sasaki Takayuki]] , a statesman († [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 7|November 7]] ） – [[:en:Maeda Toshitsune|Maeda Toshitsune]] , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* [[:en:1594|1594]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsuo Bashō|Bashō]] , the haiku poet (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1769|1769]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Konyō]] , a rangaku scholar (* [[:en:1698|1698]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1632|en|1632|WD=Q6865|lt=1632}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|en|Tokugawa Tadanaga|WD=Q1135700|lt=Tokugawa Tadanaga}} were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Zhu Zhiyu|en|Zhu Zhiyu|WD=Q11093536|lt=Zhu Zhiyu}} , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* {{ill|1682|en|1682|WD=Q7648|lt=1682}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|WD=Q7576|lt=1830}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|en|Sasaki Takayuki|WD=Q3473771|lt=Sasaki Takayuki}} , a statesman († {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|WD=Q1145295|lt=Manji}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}} ） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|en|Maeda Toshitsune|WD=Q587204|lt=Maeda Toshitsune}} , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28}} ） – {{ill|Matsuo Bashō|en|Matsuo Bashō|WD=Q5676|lt=Bashō}} , the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1769|en|1769|WD=Q7679|lt=1769}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|en|Aoki Konyō|WD=Q4067901|lt=Aoki Konyō}} , a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|en|1698|WD=Q7706|lt=1698}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|11|10|13|9|12|11|10|1012|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1632|en|1632|WD=Q6865|lt=1632|1=1632}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23|1=November 23}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|en|Tokugawa Tadanaga|WD=Q1135700|lt=Tokugawa Tadanaga|1=Tokugawa Tadanaga}} were deposed. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 28th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Zhu Zhiyu|en|Zhu Zhiyu|WD=Q11093536|lt=Zhu Zhiyu|1=Zhu Zhiyu}} , a Confucian scholar of the [[Ming Dynasty]] (* {{ill|1682|en|1682|WD=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)|1=Bunka}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|WD=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}} ） – {{ill|Sasaki Takayuki|en|Sasaki Takayuki|WD=Q3473771|lt=Sasaki Takayuki|1=Sasaki Takayuki}} , a statesman († {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|WD=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}} {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7|1=November 7}} ） – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|en|Maeda Toshitsune|WD=Q587204|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} , the lord of the Kaga Domain (* {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594|1=1594}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28|1=November 28}} ） – {{ill|Matsuo Bashō|en|Matsuo Bashō|WD=Q5676|lt=Bashō|1=Matsuo Bashō}} , the haiku poet (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644|1=1644}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1769|en|1769|WD=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|en|Aoki Konyō|WD=Q4067901|lt=Aoki Konyō|1=Aoki Konyō}} , a rangaku scholar (* {{ill|1698|en|1698|WD=Q7706|lt=1698|1=1698}} ).
